name: herald-nico
description: HERALD Nico - content writer agent (Lambda). Drafts platform copy via the model router (Sonnet default, Opus for hard cases), then gates every draft through Vera (review_content) before it becomes publishable. One agent = one service (SEC-3). Envelope per SPEC-B section 7; pipeline per SPEC-H section 4; queue state per SPEC-G.
